payload.answer: Unable to inspect memory mem_123 because its stored contents were not included in the input. No current facts can be reported.

entity_resolution.reason: The request targets a specific memory ID, but no memory contents or metadata for mem_123 were provided in the fixture input, so the system cannot inspect or summarize it without inventing facts.

details: Recognized an inspect-memory request for memory ID mem_123.
No retrievable memory payload was supplied in the fixture.
Returned no memory cards to avoid presenting unverified or superseded facts as current.

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for mem_123.
Retry the inspect command against a live Brain backend that can resolve mem_123.
If mem_123 may be deleted or superseded, request its revision/history status explicitly.
